narrative:
Adams County has 16,981 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -21.2% D−R vs -33.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
